allow: Bash(python -c "import math; exec\(open\('square_root_bisection.py'\).read\(\).split\('print\(square_root'\)[0]\); cases=[\(81,1e-3,50\),\(0.25,1e-7,10\),\(0.001,1e-7,50\)]; [print\(f'sqrt\({v}\) tol={t}: {r:.10f}, err={abs\(r-math.sqrt\(v\)\):.2e}'\) for v,t,i in cases for r in [square_root_bisection\(v,t,i\)]]")
